title: Work Schedule in Admin -> Half-Day
excerpt: It would be nice to have the half-day option on the work schedule. When an employee only have a half day off I have to put a full day and it’s not convenient.

posts.author: LauraMoso (laura.girod@motionsociety.io)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be nice to have the half-day option on the work schedule. When an employee only have a half day off I have to put a full day and it’s not convenient.

posts.author: sharonr (Sharon R)
posts.cookedHtml: Seconding the request for half-days, some of our holidays lead to us having halfdays and there is no current way to program them in.
